cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out step by step. So, there are five players: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. They each start in specific positions. The problem is asking where Eve ends up after a series of position swaps. Let me write down the initial positions first to keep track. Initial assignments: - Alice: Fullback - Bob: Center Midfielder - Claire: Right Midfielder - Dave: Left Winger - Eve: Goalkeeper Now, there are several swaps. Let me go through each one carefully. Maybe I should track each player's position after each swap. Let me make a table or just note down each step. First swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. After this swap: - Dave was Left Winger, Eve was Goalkeeper. So now: - Dave: Goalkeeper - Eve: Left Winger Others remain the same for now: - Alice: Fullback - Bob: Center Midfielder - Claire: Right Midfielder Second swap: Claire and Bob trade positions. So: - Claire was Right Midfielder, Bob was Center Midfielder. After swap: - Claire: Center Midfielder - Bob: Right Midfielder Others: - Alice: Fullback - Dave: Goalkeeper - Eve: Left Winger Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. Alice was Fullback, Bob is now Right Midfielder (from previous swap). After swapping: - Alice: Right Midfielder - Bob: Fullback Others: - Claire: Center Midfielder - Dave: Goalkeeper - Eve: Left Winger Fourth swap: Eve and Dave trade positions. Eve was Left Winger, Dave was Goalkeeper. After swapping: - Eve: Goalkeeper - Dave: Left Winger Others: - Alice: Right Midfielder - Bob: Fullback - Claire: Center Midfielder Fifth swap: Bob and Alice trade positions. Bob was Fullback, Alice was Right Midfielder. After swapping: - Bob: Right Midfielder - Alice: Fullback Others: - Claire: Center Midfielder - Dave: Left Winger - Eve: Goalkeeper So, after all these swaps, let's check where each player is: - Alice: Fullback - Bob: Right Midfielder -
